Home › Health › Calorie Calculator

🔥 Daily Calorie Calculator

Find out exactly how many calories you need per day based on your body and activity level.

Enter your details

What is a calorie calculator?

This calculator estimates your Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE) — the total number of calories you burn per day. It uses the Mifflin-St Jeor formula, the most accurate method available, to calculate your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and then multiplies it by your activity factor.

Frequently asked questions

How many calories should I eat to lose weight?

To lose weight gradually and sustainably, aim for a deficit of 300–500 calories below your TDEE. This produces a weight loss of approximately 0.3–0.5 kg per week.

What is BMR?

Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) is the number of calories your body needs at complete rest to maintain vital functions like breathing and circulation.

Is this calculator accurate?

It uses the Mifflin-St Jeor formula (2005), considered the most accurate. Results are estimates and individual metabolism may vary by up to 15%.
